title: The Greenwood Boys
question: 把今天课文里“未来活动时间表、到达、迎接、演出和维持秩序”的线索放进演出、比赛和学校活动——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: Tomorrow, my favourite team will be arriving at the station. I will be meeting them there, and in the evening they will be playing a match.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 车站迎接：一个受欢迎的组合明天到达，我们会在车站等他们
options.english_template: A popular group ___ here tomorrow, and we will meet them at the station.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 晚间活动：晚上他们会在社区活动场所表演
options.english_template: Tomorrow evening, they will give a ___ at the local community club.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 人群秩序：很多学生会来，所以老师要维持秩序
options.english_template: Many students will come, so the teachers will try to ___.
